headline: LKQ (LKQ) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Justin Jude: Thank you, Joe, and good morning, everyone.  Q1 was another quarter of solid progress across our operating segments, and we're increasingly confident in our positioning as North America continues to recover.  LKQ has started 2026 with a strong foundation, featuring a more focused organization, disciplined execution and an unwavering commitment to long-term value creation.

headline: LKQ (LKQ) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: At our September 2024 Investor Day, we set our strategic priorities, simplify our business portfolio and operations, expand our lean operating model globally with a focus on margin enhancement, invest and grow organically and pursue a disciplined capital allocation strategy.  One, additional cost-cutting measures, primarily in Europe but also in North America with a goal of cutting another $75 million in costs; two, a heightened emphasis on the strategic review of our business units in operations that may result in the sale of assets that further accelerate our simplification strategy and capital allocation priorities.  While this will not be a linear process, I remain confident that we are on track to realize the full benefits of this strategy by 2027, as outlined at our September 2024 Investor Day.

headline: LKQ (LKQ) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Justin Jude: Thank you, Joe and good morning to everyone joining us on the call today.  With some positive operational performance and onetime tax benefits, we have confidence in our full year outlook to raise our midpoint and narrow the range.

content.title: LKQ (LKQ) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
content.summary: Justin Jude: Thank you, Joe and good morning to everyone joining us on the call today.  With some positive operational performance and onetime tax benefits, we have confidence in our full year outlook to raise our midpoint and narrow the range.
